items.name_cn:
[With full original packaging]
Medium size White in stock!!️
Take Toujours for a trip, oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels premium, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:28.5*19*21cm

items.name_en: Top quality with full set packaging
items.name_cn:
Top quality with full set packaging
Small size in stock!!️
Toujours series new Sweet Pink from the brick cabinet, a bit too beautiful. High-visual-appeal pink bag, the color is super tender and very summery. It is a low-saturation pink-purple, easily mastering the macaron color. Oversized quilted design paired with classic lettering accessories, very modern and stylish. The bag structure is soft, calfskin material feels premium, unique clasp design allows the sides to fold when closed. Capacity is very nice, thoughtfully includes an inner pocket for small items.
size:23*15*15cm

items.name_cn:
【Full set packaging】
Small size Blush Pink In Stock!!️
Toujours vertical series small, exclusive market basket, a bit too beautiful, high-value bag, easily mastering a sense of sophistication, oversized quilted design, paired with classic letter accessories, full of modern fashion sense, bag structure is very soft, calfskin material full of sophistication, unique buckle clasp that folds on the side when fastened, comes with a long shoulder strap, practicality full score, capacity is also very nice, daily travel items all fit
size:16*12*18cm

items.name_cn: Dior/women's bag

items.name_en: This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Blush Beige calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
items.name_cn:
This Dior Jolie Top Handle mini chain bag is a new arrival from the 2026 Pre-Fall collection, presenting an elegant and practical design. Crafted in Blush Beige calfskin, it features a trellis pattern, with a flap adorned with a gold-finish metal CD logo and white resin beading. It features an interior pocket for various daily essentials. It comes with double top handles and an adjustable, detachable CD chain shoulder strap, which consists of leather straps and CD chain links adorned with white resin beads. It can be carried comfortably by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody, and pairs well with both casual and evening looks.
Main: Calfskin
Lining: Calfskin
Magnetic flap closure with CD buckle and white resin beading on the front
1 compartment
Double top leather handles
Adjustable, detachable chain with resin beading and leather straps
Made in Italy Dimensions: 18.5 x 13 x 8.5 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
Style No.: S3123
